parameters.jsCode:
// Contact page fetch failed — continue with existing record unchanged
return [{ json: $('Find Contact Page Links').item.json }];

// Puppeteer call errored — continue with record unchanged toward domain guess
return [{ json: $('IF — JS-Heavy Site?').item.json }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { homepage_email: $json.homepage_email || '', contact_page_email: $json.contact_page_email || '', source_url: $json.source_url || '', source_type: $json.source_type || 'none', scrape_status: $json.scrape_status || 'NoEmail', email_confidence: $json.email_confidence || 0, contact_url_candidates: $json.contact_url_candidates || '', last_scraped_at: $json.last_scraped_at || new Date().toISOString(), ...($json.scraped_phone && !$('Split Into Items').item.json.phone ? { phone: $json.scraped_phone } : {}) } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const prevRecord = $('Build Claude Prompt').item.json;
return [{ json: { ...prevRecord, ai_score: -1, ai_signals: 'Claude API Error — both attempts failed', ai_summary: 'Scoring unavailable due to API error', website_fetch_status: prevRecord.website_fetch_status || 'Success', contact_method_assessment: '' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ fields: { ai_score: $json.ai_score, ai_signals: $json.ai_signals, ai_summary: $json.ai_summary, contact_method_assessment: $json.contact_method_assessment || '', website_fetch_status: $json.website_fetch_status, status: 'Scored', date_scored: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0], domain: $json.domain } }) }}
